Submodules¶

websweep.config module¶

This module provides the WebSweep config functionality.

websweep.config.current_websweep_instance() → Path¶

Return the current websweep location

websweep.config.init_app(target_folder_path: str, source_file_path: str, extractor_delete_files: bool, use_database: bool) → int¶

Initialize the application.

websweep.config.restore_app(target_folder_path: Path) → int¶

Restore existing application.

websweep.config.get_target_folder_path(config_file: Path = PosixPath('/Users/bjorn/Downloads/testjedoei/settings.ini')) → Path¶

Return the current WebSweep instance location path

websweep.config.get_source_file_path(config_file: Path = PosixPath('/Users/bjorn/Downloads/testjedoei/settings.ini')) → Path¶

Return the current source file path

websweep.config.get_extractor_delete(config_file: Path = PosixPath('/Users/bjorn/Downloads/testjedoei/settings.ini')) → bool¶

Return whether to delete processed raw files

websweep.config.get_use_database(config_file: Path = PosixPath('/Users/bjorn/Downloads/testjedoei/settings.ini')) → bool¶

Return whether to use an SQL database raw files

websweep.main module¶

websweep.main.operate()¶
websweep.main.main(version: bool | None = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>) → None¶
websweep.main.init(headless: bool = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>) → None¶

Restore configuration of existing WebSweep instance. The exisiting location is stored in the application config file and the exisiting settings in the settings file are validated.

websweep.main.cli_config(delete_processed_files: bool = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>, source_file_path: str = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>) → None¶

Alter WebSweep configuration settings

websweep.main.websweep_address() → None¶

Open configured WebSweep instance folder

websweep.main.crawl(complement: str = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>, sock_connect: int = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>, extract: bool = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>, classification_file: ~pathlib.Path = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>) → None¶

Start caching websites

websweep.main.extract(start_date: str = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>, end_date: str = <typer.models.OptionInfo object>) → None¶

Start extracting data from the fetched files
